title: Q3-2026 pretrain: E001 validated at 52M + optimizer screen + public research note
description: Quarter milestone. Exit criteria: (1) value-embed win confirmed or killed at 52M with 3-seed band, (2) optimizer/schedule screen done, (3) one public write-up of the ladder methodology + results.

title: GOAL: frontier open LLM — open research from pretraining + post-training
description: The lab's north star. Every task on this board must trace up to published open research: pretraining (ladder to a frontier-rung model) or post-training (SFT/RL on lab checkpoints). If it doesn't serve this, it doesn't belong here.

title: Flagship: beat SmolLM2-135M @ matched compute
description: North-star of the pretrain lab. Climb the ladder 23M -> 52M -> 135M, promoting only reproduced wins. Measured on downstream benchmark at matched compute.

title: E002 value-embed @ 52M — scale-up confirmation
description: Does the E001 win hold at Ladder52M/1042M tok? B-52-s1337 baseline then E002-value-embed-52-s1337, single-seed directional. Running on the 5060 Ti box, 18h window, crash-isolated chain. Owner: agent.

title: Post-train: land posttrain_config + fineweb-edu prep changes (branch post-training-pipeline)
description: Merge the in-flight post-training-pipeline branch work: configs/posttrain_config.py + data/prepare_fineweb_edu.py changes. First concrete step of the Q3 posttrain milestone. Owner: open.

title: Q3-2026 posttrain: post-training pipeline v1 on lab checkpoints
description: Quarter milestone. Stand up the post-training pipeline (branch: post-training-pipeline) — SFT then RL on the lab's own pretrained checkpoints. Exit criteria: one lab checkpoint post-trained end-to-end with evals before/after.

title: E001 value-embed @ 23M — scale screen
description: Value embeddings (Screen10M20M winner #29) vs pinned B-S0, 3 seeds. Result: WIN — val-acc 0.3373 vs 0.3326, +0.0047 = ~12x noise band, 3/3 seeds. Done by: agent.

title: Baseline noise band @ 23M (B-S0, 3 seeds)
description: 3-seed baseline Ladder23M/469M tok on FineWeb-Edu. Result: mean val-acc 0.3326, spread ±0.0002 (s1337=.3327 s2337=.3323 s4337=.3327; s3337 crashed@35%, replaced by s4337). Noise band PINNED — verdicts now meaningful. Done by: agent.
close_reason: Noise band pinned: ±0.0002 val-acc spread across 3 seeds

title: Optimizer/schedule screen (Muon/AdamW split or LR shape)
description: QUEUE item 3: cheap S-tier screen, composes with everything. Owner: open (agent or human contributor).

title: E002 3-seed noise band @ 52M
description: If E002 directional read holds: pin 52M baseline noise band (2 more seeds) + 2 more value-embed seeds for a hard verdict. Owner: agent.

title: Exploration: Soft-MoE FFN at S tier (idea 117)
description: QUEUE item 4, >=1-in-4 exploration rule. Already implemented behind a flag. Owner: open (human contributor friendly, 1-2 day task).
